name: collapsible
title: Collapsible
description: Expandable section with smooth height animation.
docs:
# Collapsible
Expandable section with smooth height animation.
## Import
```tsx
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleSection } from "@/components/ui/collapsible";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Collapsible title="Advanced settings" defaultOpen={false} currentStep={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **title** (string) — default: `"Advanced settings"`: Title
- **defaultOpen** (boolean) — default: `false`: Default open
- **currentStep** (number): Current step
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add collapsible
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/collapsible
```
